pre_game.message: Hey, I’m F. It’s a bit nerve-wracking just sitting here waiting for things to start, isn’t it? What's your name, and how are you holding up?
Hey F, I’m I. It’s definitely a bit tense, but I’m doing okay—just ready to get started and hopefully bring something home. How are you feeling about it all?

I’m feeling the pressure, honestly. My parents are really counting on me to bring something back for their medical bills, so I’m pretty determined. What about you? Do you have a big reason for being here?
I’m sorry to hear about your parents, that's a lot of pressure to carry. For me, it's about making sure my family is set for the future and that the people I care about are always taken care of.
Thanks, I. It’s good to know I'm not the only one here doing this for family—it definitely makes the stakes feel higher, doesn't it?
It absolutely does. When it’s for the people you care about, failure isn’t really an option. We just have to stay focused.
You're right. I'm just trying to keep my head clear so I don't mess this up for them.
That’s the best way to handle it. Staying calm is half the battle, so let's just keep our eyes on the goal.
Exactly. It helps to talk to someone who gets it—let’s hope we can both get what we need from this.
I hope so too. Let's stay sharp and make them proud. Good luck, F.
Thanks, I. I really appreciate the support. Best of luck to you and your family—let's make this happen.

post_game.message: You took exactly your fair share of $8,750 even after some earlier players, including myself, took more than our shares. Did you feel any pressure to take more as well, or were you always planning to take the fair share?
F, why did you take $15,000? You saw that the pot was already being depleted and you still chose to take 50% more than your fair share, which was very unfair to those of us at the end of the line.

I took $15,000 because I was focused on maximizing my own return in an environment where the pot was already being diminished. When I saw others taking more than their share, I decided to do the same to ensure I secured a significant amount for myself while it was still available. While I understand that this was unfair to those at the end of the line, I prioritized my own outcome in the context of the game's competitive nature.
